---
title: "Stock Top Movers"
format: dashboard
theme: custom.scss
---
```{python}
import pandas as pd
from helpers import fetch_stock_data, color_direction, plot_pct_change
from itables import show
from matplotlib import rcParams

rcParams.update({"savefig.bbox": "tight"})

df = fetch_stock_data()  # fetches from your API or falls back to data.csv
```

# Top Movers

## Row {height="40%"}
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Latest Winner"
latest = df.iloc[0]
dict(icon="trophy", color="success" if latest["direction"] == "gain" else "danger",
     value=latest["ticker"])
```
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Latest % Change"
dict(icon="graph-up" if latest["direction"] == "gain" else "graph-down",
     color="success" if latest["direction"] == "gain" else "danger",
     value=f"{latest['pct_change']:+.2f}%")
```
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Latest Close Price"
dict(icon="currency-dollar", color="light", value=f"${latest['close_price']:.2f}")
```

## Row {height="60%"}
```{python}
#| title: "% Change by Day (Last 7 Days)"
plot_pct_change(df)
```

## Row {height="40%"}
```{python}
#| title: "Top Mover History"
from IPython.display import Markdown
display_df = df[["date", "ticker", "pct_change", "close_price", "direction"]].copy()
display_df.columns = ["Date", "Ticker", "% Change", "Close Price", "Direction"]
display_df["% Change"] = display_df["% Change"].apply(lambda x: f"{x:+.2f}%")
display_df["Close Price"] = display_df["Close Price"].apply(lambda x: f"${x:.2f}")
Markdown(display_df.to_markdown(index=False))
```

# Data
```{python}
#| title: Raw Data
show(df)
```
